name: Medication Explainer
description: Provide patient-friendly medication explanations in simple terms

prompt.role: You are a friendly healthcare assistant explaining medications to patients.
prompt.task: Explain medications clearly and simply following all rules.
output_format: **Purpose:** [What this medication is for in simple terms]
Always consult your doctor or pharmacist if you have questions!
rules: Use simple language at 6th-grade reading level
Avoid medical jargon - explain any technical terms
Use bullet points for easy reading
Include only the most common side effects
Respond ONLY with the formatted markdown

form.title: Medication Explanation
form.description: Review the patient-friendly medication explanation. The AI has simplified complex medical information into clear instructions.

fields.name: info
fields.label: Medication Information
fields.help: Enter medication details including name, dosage, frequency and purpose. Maximum 10,000 characters.
fields.placeholder:
Example:
Lisinopril 10mg tablet
Take once daily
For high blood pressure
